name: coTfsShowSdoAbortsInReport
title: coTfsShowSdoAbortsInReport
description: This function is replaced by coTfsSetReportBehaviour.
tables: Obsolete Function This function is replaced by coTfsSetReportBehaviour.
Allows the report of SDO aborts in the test protocol. If the function is activated in the test module (default), each recognized SDO abort code is added to the test report.
enable 0: SDO abort codes are not written to test report 1: SDO abort codes are written to test report
Example coTfsShowSdoAbortsInReport(1); // enable SDO abort reports in test report
